init.description: Shell tool initialisations (bash + zsh); each guarded, no-ops if the tool isn't installed (see docs/plugins.md for the tool list)

aliases.description: Shell aliases and PATH exports (bash + zsh)

zshrc-wiring.description: Source init.sh and aliases.sh from ~/.zshrc (managed block)

bashrc-handoff.description: Hand off to zsh from ~/.bashrc when zsh is installed (guarded, no-op without zsh)

bashrc-wiring.description: Source init.sh and aliases.sh from ~/.bashrc when staying in bash (managed block, ordered after the handoff)
